case_title: FIRESIDE BANK, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. PEDRO MARROQUIN

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE COURT FINDS THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING WHETHER THIS WAS A COMMERCIAL REASONABLE SALE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.
